title: [MTS/IV] Sphase Vehicle Mashup Pack (SVMP)
description: A bunch of random vehicles with fun customization and functionalities.
body:
One of those oldschool Flans style packs, where you can find anything from a cutting-edge hypercar to a Cold War army truck. Literally.


<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/fCryTV7ytfY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

-------------------------------------------------

DESCRIPTION:

SVMP is a content pack for the Immersive Vehicles mod. It does not work standalone. It is a passion project. At large, I am a developer for Craftspeed, another content pack. This is just the side gig. Therefore I do not have all the time in the world to work on this, so expect a garbage update schedule. This pack consists of vehicles I personally like enough, to spend the time bringing them into Minecraft.

 -------------------------------------------------

PACK CONTENTS: 

This pack contains vehicles that I personally like, and want to do, so there is no theme as such. I do my best to include some customization, where possible too. I mostly like old, little-known, and quite frankly, poorly made cars, so those, you can expect the most of. However, I do occasionally feel like making something nice and shiny, or something big and sturdy.

Note, that as I develop this pack purely for self enjoyment, it is unlikely that I will take a request (unless you hit me with something I like).

- Dual Ghia 6.4L
- Opel Campo
- Ikarus 260
- Renault Mégane Coupe Mk 1
- AM General M939 Series
- Volvo 480
- Toyota Celica (T180) (Voxel)
- Wiesmann GT MF5
- TVR Sagaris
- Aston Martin Valkyrie

-------------------------------------------------

COMPATIBILITY:

Since SVMP doesn't have many custom wheels, steering wheels, seats, engines and light bars, those specific parts are compatible with their equivalents from Poker's Garage and Craftspeed, both in scale and functionality.

-------------------------------------------------

FAQ:

- How to install the pack?

     You need a Minecraft Forge installation, just put it in mods folder. It requires Immersive Vehicles already in to           
     run!

- Please update it to newer versions of Minecraft!

     SVMP is merely an addon to Immersive Vehicles. If it won't be updated to newer MC versions, SVMP won't be 
     either.

- Can I use SVMP on my server?

     If it's a private server, yes. If it's a public one, you must ask me first, not only because of permissions, but 
     also because I'd love to visit! (Sphase#1753 via Discord, or @MikeMiner01 via Twitter)

- My car does not move, help!

     You might need to turn the engine on, put fuel in the car, or a bunch of other things. For further information, 
     see the Immersive Vehicles mod page, or read the manual provided in the Immersive Vehicles mod itself.

- When will you release an update?

     This is a passion project of mine, and in terms of priority, it falls behind another pack's development I'm part 
     of, so the update schedule will likely be very inconsistent, so...   beats me honestly

- How can I open the doors/hood on the TVR Sagaris/Aston Martin Valkyrie?

     Please see the images section of this page, there you will find the locations of the buttons/latches (true to 
     life).
